faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Cypress Hills homes?
faqs.answer: Cypress Hills has many older buildings with basements, crawl spaces, and aging plumbing systems that create the humid environments silverfish love. These moisture-loving pests thrive in bathrooms, basements, and kitchens where humidity levels are high, making pre-war Brooklyn buildings particularly vulnerable.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a silverfish infestation in Cypress Hills?
faqs.answer: Most silverfish infestations in Cypress Hills homes can be significantly reduced within 2-3 weeks of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically requires follow-up visits over 4-6 weeks to address eggs and newly hatched silverfish, ensuring long-term control throughout your property.
